author: Artur Smirnov
description: Treat raw @.opencode/... Markdown references as internal Obsidian links for the native graph view. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Artur Smirnov
manifest.description: Treat raw Opencode Markdown references (@.opencode/...) as internal links for the native graph view.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## OpenCode Links Graph v0.1.3
First release of OpenCode Links Graph, an Obsidian plugin that makes raw `@.opencode/...md` references visible in Obsidian's native Graph and Local Graph views.
### Features
- Detects raw OpenCode-style Markdown references such as `@.opencode/knowledge/README.md`.
- Resolves references to existing files in the vault.
- Adds runtime graph edges through Obsidian's resolved-link metadata.
- Preserves source files without rewriting links.
- Includes plugin settings for link regex, refresh delay, notices, and debug logging.
### Notes
- Only existing target files are linked.
- Heading and block references are not supported yet.
- This release ships `main.js` and `manifest.json`; there is no `styles.css` asset.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
